payload.last_assistant_message:
PR created: https://github.com/adobe-ai-pod/mas/pull/9

The implementation adds two CSS custom property overrides to `merch-card-collection-header.plans` in `web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js`:
- `--merch-card-collection-header-filter-height: 66px`
- `--merch-card-collection-header-search-min-height: 66px`

This increases the header height ~50% from the default 44px, affecting the filter button, sort button, and search input.
